ideas.title: Constellation Trial Seasons
ideas.summary: Add rotating season tracks with route-themed missions, weekly modifiers, and cosmetic-only reward rails.

ideas.title: Companion Relic Forge
ideas.summary: Craft relic loadouts with readable stat budgets and age-safe progression pacing.

ideas.title: Guild Expedition Rail
ideas.summary: Co-op async expedition board with moderation-safe emotes and no private external contact channels.

ideas.title: Arcade Creator Toolkit
ideas.summary: Data-driven mini-game templates so designers can ship new events without changing core code.
